title: Green Rice Porridge
description: A warm rice pudding made with pandan and coconut milk, finished with a palm sugar coconut syrup.
ingredients: Coconut syrup: 3 medium-sized pieces of palm sugar
steps: Rice Pudding: In a pot, add water, coconut milk, salt, pandan leaves, and rice flour. Stir well until dissolved. Cook while continuously stirring until it thickens and bubbles. Turn off heat and set aside.
Coconut Syrup: In a pot, cook all the coconut syrup ingredients over low heat until it thickens, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
To Serve: Spoon the rice pudding into bowls. Drizzle the coconut syrup over the top. Serve warm or chilled.

title: Scrambled Tofu
description: A savory, spiced tofu scramble with kale, bell pepper, and a squeeze of lemon.
ingredients: 1/2 cup chopped bell pepper (mix of green and red)
1 tbsp water (optional, if mixture looks too dry)
steps: Prep tofu: Crumble tofu and set aside.
Sauté veggies: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Sauté red onion, garlic, and green onion for 2 minutes. Add tomato and cook 2 more minutes. Add bell pepper and cook 1 minute.
Add spices: Stir in turmeric, red chili powder, cumin, smoked paprika, and salt.
Cook tofu: Add crumbled tofu and mash with a potato masher to combine with veggies and spices. Add water if needed. Stir in kale and cook 1 minute.
Finish and serve: Turn off heat, cover, let sit 2 minutes. Stir in lemon juice and garnish with cilantro. Sprinkle nutritional yeast if desired.

title: Granola
description: A big-batch toasted granola with coconut, pumpkin and sunflower seeds, cashews, and dried fruit.
ingredients: Simple syrup: 250 g sugar + 60 ml water
steps: Preheat oven to 150°C (300°F).
Prepare simple syrup: combine sugar and water in a small saucepan, heat until sugar dissolves. Set aside.
Mix dry ingredients: combine oats, coconut flakes, seeds, cashews, salt, and cinnamon in a large bowl.
Add syrup: pour over the dry mixture and stir until coated.
Bake: spread on a lined baking sheet. Bake 25-30 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes.
Add fruits: once golden, stir in raisins and dates while still warm.
Cool & store in an airtight container.

title: Vegan Gluten Free Coconut Bread
description: A moist rice-and-tapioca-flour coconut bread, naturally gluten-free.
steps: Preheat oven to 160-180°C (320-356°F).
Combine rice flour, tapioca flour, sugar, and desiccated coconut. Add coconut milk, water, and salt. Add vanilla if using. Mix into a smooth batter.
Pour into a greased or lined baking pan. Bake 40-50 minutes, until a toothpick comes out clean.
Cool in the pan 10 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack before slicing.
Tip: lightly toast the shredded coconut first for extra flavor.

title: Vegan Gluten Free Banana Bread
description: A rice-and-tapioca-flour banana bread, soft and naturally gluten-free.
ingredients: 1/2 cup water or any milk (dairy or non-dairy)
steps: Preheat oven to 160-180°C (320-356°F).
Combine mashed banana, rice flour, tapioca flour, coconut palm sugar, melted coconut oil, and water or milk. Add cinnamon and baking powder. Mix until smooth.
Pour into a greased or lined loaf pan. Bake 40-50 minutes, until a toothpick comes out clean.
Cool in the pan 10 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack before slicing.

title: Jamu
description: A traditional Indonesian turmeric-ginger tonic, warm or chilled.
ingredients: 2-3 cm fresh turmeric, thinly sliced (or 1-2 tsp turmeric powder)
1-2 tbsp maple syrup (adjust to taste, in place of honey)
Optional additions: lemongrass, bruised galangal, black pepper, crushed cloves, cinnamon
steps: Bring water to a boil. Add turmeric, ginger, and any optional herbs/spices. Lower heat and simmer 15-20 minutes to infuse.
Strain the liquid to remove solids. Stir in maple syrup and lime or lemon juice. Adjust sweetness to taste.
Serve warm or chilled.

title: Peanut Butter
description: Simple homemade roasted peanut butter, smooth and creamy.
steps: Place roasted peanuts in a food processor or chopper.
Blend until they break down into a coarse mixture, then a paste, then a smooth, creamy butter — this may take several minutes.
While blending, gradually add coconut oil to reach desired consistency. Add salt to taste.
Transfer to an airtight container and store in the refrigerator.

title: Tempeh Tandoori Skewers
description: Marinated, grilled tempeh skewers in a coconut-spice tandoori marinade.
steps: Prepare marinade: blend coconut milk, garlic, ginger, garam masala, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, black pepper, sea salt, lemon juice, and mustard until smooth.
Marinate tempeh: cut tempeh into small pieces and add to the marinade for at least 30 minutes. Steam marinated tempeh 5 minutes, trim, and cut into small batons.
Prepare skewers: soak bamboo skewers in water 15 minutes. Thread tempeh onto skewers.
Grill: heat a char grill pan, lightly spray with oil. Cook skewers on each side until nicely charred.

title: Baked Sweet Potato with Sweet Paprika and Thyme
description: Roasted sweet potato wedges with paprika and thyme.
ingredients: 2 large sweet potatoes – peeled (optional) and cut into wedges or cubes
1/2 tsp dried thyme (or 1 tsp fresh thyme leaves)
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F). Line a baking tray with parchment paper.
Place sweet potato wedges or cubes in a large bowl.
Add olive oil, sweet paprika, thyme, salt (and pepper if using). Toss to coat evenly.
Spread in a single layer on the tray. Roast 25-30 minutes, turning halfway, until golden and tender.
Serve hot as a side dish or snack.

title: Avocado Salad with Parsley
description: A fresh, simple salad of avocado, tomato, cucumber, and parsley in a lime dressing.
ingredients: 1 cup cherry tomatoes or 2 medium tomatoes – diced
steps: In a medium bowl, combine avocado, tomato, cucumber, and parsley.
In a small bowl, whisk olive oil, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Pour dressing over the salad and gently toss to coat.
Serve immediately for the freshest flavor.

title: Three-Color Salad (Rucola, Beetroot, White Cabbage)
description: A vibrant, cleansing salad of arugula, beetroot, and shredded cabbage with a lime dressing.
ingredients: 1 small beetroot, cooked or roasted, thinly sliced or julienned
Optional garnish: toasted nuts (walnut, almond, or sunflower seed)
steps: Boil or roast beetroot until tender, cool, and slice thinly. Shred white cabbage finely. Wash and dry rucola leaves.
Whisk together olive oil, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Arrange rucola, cabbage, and beetroot in a serving bowl or plate. Drizzle with dressing.
Toss gently just before serving. Enjoy fresh as a side dish.

title: Waldorf Salad (Vegan Version)
description: A creamy vegan mayo-dressed salad of romaine, apple, celery, and raisins.
ingredients: 1 small head baby romaine, roughly chopped
1 tsp lemon juice or apple cider vinegar
Salt and black pepper, to taste
Optional garnish: crushed walnuts or pumpkin seeds, fresh parsley, a few grapes
steps: Mix vegan mayo, lemon juice, maple syrup, salt, and black pepper. Whisk until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine romaine, green tomato, apple, celery, and raisins.
Gently fold in the dressing until evenly coated.
Chill 10-15 minutes if desired, then serve fresh as a light lunch or side dish.

title: Vegan Mayonnaise (Soy Milk Base)
description: A simple emulsified soy-milk mayonnaise you can make at home.
ingredients: 1 cup neutral oil (sunflower, canola, or light olive oil)
1 1/2 tsp apple cider vinegar or lemon juice
Optional: a pinch of garlic powder or maple syrup
steps: Add soy milk, vinegar (or lemon juice), mustard, and salt to a tall container or blender jar.
Start blending on medium speed. Slowly drizzle in the oil in a thin, steady stream while blending continuously until thick and creamy (1-2 minutes).
Adjust texture: if too thin, blend longer or add more oil; if too thick, add 1-2 tsp soy milk. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Transfer to a clean jar and refrigerate. Keeps up to 7 days.

title: Protein Salad with Tahini Dressing
description: A hearty mixed-bean salad with soaked seeds and a creamy tahini-lemon dressing.
ingredients: 1 cup mixed beans (chickpeas, red beans, black beans – cooked or canned)
1 small head baby romaine – chopped or torn
Optional: cucumber, fresh mint or parsley
1 tsp maple syrup (in place of honey)
steps: Whisk tahini, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper. Add water gradually until smooth and creamy.
In a large bowl, combine beans, soaked seeds, cherry tomatoes, and romaine.
Pour the tahini dressing over and toss gently to coat.
Garnish with extra seeds or chopped herbs. Enjoy chilled or at room temperature.

title: Chayote–Mango Salad with Raisins & Parsley
description: A refreshing salad of julienned chayote and mango in a cumin-lime dressing.
ingredients: 1 medium chayote squash – peeled, seeded, julienned or thinly sliced
1 small ripe but firm mango – peeled, julienned or diced
steps: Peel, halve, and seed chayote; julienne or slice thinly. Blanch 1-2 minutes if a softer texture is preferred, then drain and cool.
Combine chayote, mango, and parsley in a bowl.
Whisk lime juice, olive oil (if using), cumin, coriander, sweet paprika, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pour dressing over the salad mixture and toss gently to coat.
Taste and adjust; chill or serve immediately.

title: Butternut Squash Salad with Maple Dressing
description: Roasted butternut squash over arugula and kale with pomegranate and a maple-Dijon dressing.
ingredients: 2 cups butternut squash – peeled and cubed (about 1.5 cm pieces)
Optional: roasted walnuts or pumpkin seeds
1 tbsp apple cider vinegar or lemon juice
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F). Toss cubed butternut with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast 25-30 minutes until golden and tender. Cool slightly.
Massage chopped kale gently with a little olive oil and salt for 1 minute to soften. Add rucola and toss.
Whisk dressing ingredients until smooth.
Add roasted butternut, pomegranate seeds, and any nuts/seeds to the greens. Drizzle with maple dressing and toss.
Serve immediately or chill briefly.

title: Syrian Salad (Romaine Salad with Za'atar Dressing)
description: A crisp romaine salad with tomato, cucumber, mint, and a za'atar-olive oil dressing.
ingredients: 1/4 cup minced fresh mint or 1 tbsp dried mint
steps: Place lettuce, tomato, cucumber, onion, parsley, and mint in a large salad bowl.
Squeeze lemon juice over the bowl. Grate garlic directly over the salad.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with za'atar. Season with salt and pepper.
Gently toss and check seasoning before serving.

title: Brown Lentil Salad
description: A simple lentil salad with cherry tomatoes, parsley, and a cumin-lime dressing.
ingredients: 1 1/2 cups cooked brown lentils (or 1 can, drained & rinsed)
steps: If using dried lentils, cook until just tender, drain, and let cool.
In a bowl, mix lentils, cherry tomatoes, and parsley.
Whisk olive oil, lime juice, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Pour dressing over the lentil mixture and toss to coat.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Olivier Salad (Russian Potato Salad)
description: A classic potato salad with carrots, peas, and pickles in a mustard-mayo dressing.
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
1 tbsp lemon juice or pickle brine
Garnish: fresh dill or parsley – finely chopped
steps: Boil potatoes, carrots, and peas separately until tender (don't overcook). Drain and cool completely.
In a large bowl, combine cooled potatoes, carrots, peas, and diced pickles.
Whisk vegan mayo, mustard, lemon juice (or brine), salt, and pepper.
Pour dressing over the salad and mix gently until well coated.
Refrigerate at least 30 minutes before serving. Garnish with dill or parsley.

title: Moringa Soup
description: A light, brothy soup with moringa leaves, sweet corn, and basil.
steps: Boil water with shallot and corn until corn is tender. Season with salt and mushroom powder.
Reduce heat, add moringa and sweet basil leaves.
Simmer briefly and serve hot.

title: Burrata Bruschetta
description: Grilled coconut bread drizzled with herb pesto, topped with roasted tomatoes, vegan burrata, and fresh basil.
ingredients: 1/4 cup pine nuts or sunflower seeds
1/3 cup olive oil, plus more for roasting
4 slices gluten-free coconut bread (or gf bread of choice)
steps: Vegan burrata: Blend soaked cashews, coconut cream, lemon juice, and salt until smooth. Warm agar with 2 tbsp water until dissolved, stir into the cashew mixture, pour into a small bowl lined with plastic wrap, and chill until set into a soft round.
Pesto: Blend basil, pine nuts, nutritional yeast, garlic, and olive oil until mostly smooth. Season with salt.
Roast tomatoes: Toss cherry tomatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast at 200°C (400°F) for 12-15 minutes until blistered.
Grill bread slices until golden and slightly charred.
Assemble: Spread pesto on each slice, top with a scoop of vegan burrata, roasted tomatoes, and fresh basil. Drizzle with balsamic reduction and olive oil.

title: Shirataki Curry
description: Konjac noodles and seared tofu in a red curry broth with carrots and bean sprouts, topped with crispy shallots.
steps: Rinse shirataki noodles thoroughly, then blanch in boiling water for 2 minutes and drain.
Sear tofu cubes in oil until golden on all sides; set aside.
In the same pan, fry red curry paste in a little oil until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add coconut milk and broth, stir to combine, and bring to a simmer.
Season with tamari, coconut sugar, and lime juice.
Add carrots and simmer 3-4 minutes until just tender.
Add noodles, tofu, and bean sprouts; warm through for 2 minutes.
Serve topped with crispy shallots and scallions.

title: Balinese Rijsttafel
description: A plant-based platter of turmeric rice, curried tempeh, vegetable lawar, spiced shredded mushroom, sambal matah 'calamari,' and roasted jackfruit.
ingredients: Turmeric rice: 2 cups rice, 1 tsp turmeric, 1 cup coconut milk, 1.5 cups water, salt
Curried tempeh: 200g tempeh cubed, 2 tbsp yellow curry paste, 1 cup coconut milk, handful kemangi (Thai basil)
Vegetable lawar: 2 cups shredded long beans and coconut, red chili, shallot, garlic, kaffir lime leaf
Shredded mushroom: 200g oyster mushrooms shredded, sambal spices (chili, shallot, garlic, turmeric)
Sambal matah 'calamari': 1 cup sliced hearts of palm or banana blossom, shallot, lemongrass, chili, lime
Roasted jackfruit: 300g young jackfruit, sweet soy marinade, garlic, coriander
steps: Turmeric rice: Rinse rice, cook with turmeric, coconut milk, water, and salt until fluffy.
Curried tempeh: Simmer tempeh in curry paste and coconut milk with kemangi until sauce thickens.
Vegetable lawar: Blanch long beans, toss with grated coconut and a pounded paste of chili, shallot, garlic, and kaffir lime leaf.
Shredded mushroom: Sauté shredded oyster mushroom with sambal spice paste until caramelized.
Sambal matah: Toss sliced hearts of palm with raw shallot, lemongrass, chili, and lime juice.
Roasted jackfruit: Marinate jackfruit in sweet soy, garlic, and coriander; roast until edges crisp.
Arrange all components on a large platter with steamed greens to serve family-style.

title: Rebung Stroganoff
description: Gluten-free spaghetti tossed with mushroom, broccoli, and sun-dried tomato in a creamy vegan stroganoff sauce, topped with crispy cabbage and nut parmesan.
ingredients: 1 cup raw cashews, soaked and blended with 1 cup vegetable broth
1 cup shredded purple cabbage, for frying
1/4 cup almonds or cashews blended with nutritional yeast, garlic powder, and salt (nut parmesan)
steps: Cook gluten-free spaghetti according to package directions; drain and set aside.
Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until soft.
Add mushrooms and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add broccoli and sun-dried tomatoes; cook 2 minutes more.
Stir in blended cashew cream, nutritional yeast, and smoked paprika. Simmer until thickened, season with salt and pepper.
Toss cooked pasta through the sauce.
Fry shredded purple cabbage in a little oil until crisp for garnish.
Serve topped with crispy cabbage and nut parmesan.

title: Char Kway Teow
description: Stir-fried rice noodles with cabbage, leafy greens, and seared king oyster 'squid' in a homemade vegan oyster sauce, served with pickled vegetables.
ingredients: 2 king oyster mushrooms, scored and sliced to resemble squid
1 cup leafy greens (bok choy or kale)
Quick pickle: 1 carrot and 1/2 cucumber, julienned, tossed with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt
steps: Make the quick pickle by tossing julienned carrot and cucumber with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt; set aside.
Soak rice noodles in warm water until pliable, then drain.
Sear scored king oyster mushroom slices in 1 tbsp oil until caramelized and squid-like; set aside.
In a hot wok, stir-fry shallots and garlic in remaining oil until fragrant.
Add cabbage, leafy greens, and bean sprouts; stir-fry 1-2 minutes.
Add noodles, vegan oyster sauce, tamari, and dark soy sauce; toss over high heat until noodles are coated and slightly charred.
Fold in the seared mushroom 'squid.'
Serve hot with the pickled vegetables on the side.

title: Spinach Eggplant Lasagna
description: Baked eggplant layered with vegan bolognaise, creamed spinach, and plant-based mozzarella, served with cucumber-tomato salsa.
ingredients: Olive oil, salt, and pepper for roasting
Cucumber-tomato salsa: 1 cucumber diced, 1 tomato diced, 1/4 red onion diced, lime juice, cilantro, salt
steps: Roast eggplant slices with olive oil, salt, and pepper at 200°C (400°F) for 20 minutes until tender.
Bolognaise: Sauté onion and garlic, add lentils, walnuts, tomato sauce, oregano, and basil. Simmer 15 minutes.
Creamed spinach: Wilt spinach in a pan, blend or stir with cashew cream, garlic, and nutmeg until creamy.
Salsa: Combine cucumber, tomato, red onion, lime juice, cilantro, and salt.
Layer in a baking dish: eggplant, bolognaise, creamed spinach, repeat, and top with vegan mozzarella.
Bake at 190°C (375°F) for 25 minutes until bubbly and golden.
Rest 10 minutes before serving with cucumber-tomato salsa on the side.

title: Seasonal Tropical Juice
description: A bright blend of seasonal tropical fruit, juiced fresh.
ingredients: 1 cup coconut water or filtered water
steps: Combine all fruit with the water in a blender and blend until smooth.
Strain through a fine mesh sieve if a smoother juice is preferred.
Pour over ice and serve immediately.

title: Super Greens
description: Leafy green, ginger, celery, parsley, and cucumber juice.
steps: Juice the greens, celery, cucumber, ginger, and parsley (or blend with water and strain).
Stir in lemon juice.
Serve chilled over ice.

title: Liver Cleanser
description: Red beet root, carrot, turmeric, lime, and green apple juice.
steps: Juice the beet, carrots, apple, and turmeric (or blend with water and strain).
Stir in lime juice.
Serve immediately over ice.

title: Colon Cleanser
description: Carrot, orange, ginger, and fresh mint juice.
steps: Juice the carrots, orange, and ginger (or blend with water and strain).
Stir in torn mint leaves.
Serve chilled.

title: Body Cleanser
description: Pineapple, carrot, celery, ginger, and lemon juice.
steps: Juice the pineapple, carrots, celery, and ginger (or blend with water and strain).
Stir in lemon juice.
Serve over ice.

title: Ginger Electrolytes
description: A refreshing electrolyte drink with ginger, lemon, sea salt, coconut water, and coco-biotic.
ingredients: 1 tsp grated fresh ginger, strained for juice
1 tsp natural sweetener (coconut sugar or honey), to taste
steps: Combine coconut water, coconut kefir, lemon juice, and ginger juice in a glass.
Stir in a pinch of sea salt and sweetener to taste.
Serve chilled over ice.

title: Tropical Fizz
description: Strawberry, pineapple, green apple, lime, and beet, topped with sparkling water.
steps: Blend strawberries, pineapple, apple, beet, and lime juice until smooth.
Strain into a glass filled with ice.
Top with sparkling water and stir gently before serving.

title: Ginger Mimosa
description: Orange juice and ginger syrup topped with sparkling water.
steps: Fill a glass with ice and pour in orange juice and ginger syrup.
Top with sparkling water and stir gently.
Garnish with an orange twist.

title: Ginger Tonic
description: Lemongrass, ginger, lime, and palm syrup topped with sparkling water.
ingredients: 1 stalk lemongrass, bruised and finely chopped
steps: Muddle lemongrass and ginger in the bottom of a glass.
Add lime juice and palm syrup, stir well.
Fill with ice and top with sparkling water.

title: Turmeric Tonic
description: Fresh turmeric, lime, ginger, and black pepper topped with sparkling water.
ingredients: 1-inch piece fresh turmeric, grated (or 1 tsp turmeric powder)
steps: Combine turmeric, ginger, lime juice, black pepper, and sweetener in a glass and stir well.
Fill with ice and top with sparkling water.
Stir gently before serving.

title: Antioxidant Super Food
description: Balinese cacao, orange, and berries, garnished with coconut, cacao nibs, and goji berry.
ingredients: 3/4 cup fresh orange juice, plus zest of 1/2 orange
steps: Blend cacao powder, orange juice, orange zest, berries, and ginger until smooth.
Pour into a glass.
Garnish with dried coconut, cacao nibs, and goji berries.

title: Super Immunity Booster
description: Orange, pineapple, mango, ginger, lemon, and fresh mint juice.
steps: Juice or blend the orange, pineapple, mango, and ginger together.
Stir in lemon juice.
Garnish with fresh mint and serve chilled.

title: Passion Fruit Mocktail
description: An alcohol-free tropical mocktail with passion fruit, pineapple, lime, and butterfly pea flower syrup.
steps: Fill a glass with ice.
Add passion fruit pulp, pineapple juice, and lime juice; stir.
Slowly pour in butterfly pea flower syrup so it settles for a layered effect.
Garnish with fresh mint.

title: Rejuvenation Elixir
description: A cardamom-flavored fermented cilantro hibiscus tea with tropical fruit and mint (alcohol-free).
ingredients: 1/4 cup fermented cilantro tea or kombucha, cilantro-infused
1/2 cup chopped tropical fruit (pineapple, papaya, or mango)
steps: Combine hibiscus tea, fermented cilantro tea, and cardamom in a glass; stir well.
Add chopped tropical fruit.
Fill with ice and garnish with fresh mint.

title: Gut Shots
description: A probiotic-rich shot of pineapple, turmeric, ginger, and coconut kefir.
steps: Juice or blend the pineapple, turmeric, and ginger together, straining if blended.
Stir in coconut kefir.
Serve as a small shot.

title: Whole Young Coconut
description: Fresh young coconut, served whole and chilled for its water and soft flesh.
steps: Chill the coconut thoroughly.
Cut off the top to expose the water, and serve with a straw and a spoon for the flesh.
